text:
Once upon a time, there was a clever little squirrel named Oliver. One sunny afternoon, Oliver discovered a forgotten garden treasure while nibbling on an orange blossom.

There lay a tiny old bottle, cobwebbed and dusted with petulant gray. Curious, Oliver sniffed it and discovered it was a potion meant to extend his life many times over. His eyes gleamed with adventurous sparkle.

Little did Oliver know he was already living decades beyond his years. Nights rustled the old trees, and leaves whispered tales. When Oliver finally popped the cork, a stream of sparkling stars spilled out.

Every day after that, Oliver just needed a small fluttery shake to remind him of the magic inside.

Years later, Oliver grew old and wise, guiding squirrels through enchanted forests rather than popping pills. One foggy morning, feeling unusually young, he glanced at the old bottle. With a flicker of mischief, he downed just a tiny bit.

Suddenly, flowers blossomed overnight! Birds
